  ?movie wdt:P179 wd:Q2716420 .
  ?movie wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q11424 .
  ?movie rdfs:label ?title .
  FILTER(LANG(?title) = 'en')

  ?movie wdt:P577 ?releaseDate .
  FILTER(xsd:dateTime(?releaseDate) < "2013-01-01T00:00:00Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime)
}
